blocked_commands.message: Blocks until timeout. Use 'gh run view {id}' to poll.
Must run via CI. Push to branch and let deploy-preview.yml handle it. Set SDD_DEBUG=1 to override for local k3d deploys.
Must run via CI. Push to branch — the workflow builds and pushes to GHCR. Set SDD_DEBUG=1 to override for local k3d builds.
Bypasses CI. Push to branch — CI pushes to GHCR and the cluster pulls from there. Set SDD_DEBUG=1 to override for local k3d deploys.
Cluster state should be managed by Helm + the reconciler, not manual kubectl. Use /feature-change for lasting changes. Set SDD_DEBUG=1 if this is just for debugging.
